title: How to return to the original, OLD Monday.com view?
excerpt: Hello! How do I get rid of the new Monday.com view? There is a bug that I have reported a few times and still isn’t fixed and I’m going nuts having to refresh all the time, so I want out of it ASAP. I followed the instru…

posts.author: Kmb1 (Kimberli)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello! How do I get rid of the new Monday.com view? There is a bug that I have reported a few times and still isn’t fixed and I’m going nuts having to refresh all the time, so I want out of it ASAP. I followed the instructions for going to my profile icon, clicking monday.labs, and then navigating down to Open board experience experiment which says “Active” but does not have any option for disabling it. Most of the other sections have buttons but this one does not. Please help!

monday1025×1397 137 KB

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @Kmb1
What about activating the “Close board experience experiment”?

posts.author: graciej (Precious Grace Juntong)
posts.cookedHtml:
It worked when I did that
Also, I hope the option to have the old view will be available in the future. Im not a fan of the new look.

posts.author: jubsdell (Jacques)
posts.cookedHtml:
I currently have the same issue … and would like to go back to the previous view options, but don’t see the close board selection on my side …

I do however have Disable new item page experience , will this do the same?
